name: ROHU Solutions Marketing Web
description: Marketing and sales website for ROHU Solutions — a Colombian SaaS company with a catalog of business applications.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL.description: Canonical public URL of the deployed app

NEXT_PUBLIC_DEMO_URL.description: URL of the hosted ROHU Contable demo

NEXT_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_PHONE.description: Owner WhatsApp phone in E.164 without the leading +

NEXT_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_DEFAULT_MESSAGE.value: Hola, me interesa ROHU Solutions y quiero más información.

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Server-only token of the Telegram bot used for lead notifications

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Server-only chat ID where lead notifications are sent

SMTP_SECURE.description: SMTP TLS mode (true for port 465, false for 587 with STARTTLS)

SMTP_PASS.description: SMTP password. For Gmail, use a 16-char App Password (never your real password).

SMTP_FROM.description: The From header of outgoing emails

SMTP_TO.description: The destination email address for new-lead notifications

LEAD_API_URL.description: Optional CRM webhook that also receives each lead

NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION.description: Force installing devDependencies for the Next.js build
